form.formComment: Mare returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last campaign second in a small field at Santa Anita January 24 over 1308m, 5.5 len behind Thirsty Trickster carrying 55.5kg at $3.70. When resuming last campaign second in a small field at Del Mar August 22 over 1308m, 4 len behind Stay In Line with 54.5kg at $2.40. Looks a key runner.

form.formComment: Last start 3rd of 8 at Turfway Park on March 19 over 1609m, 3 len behind My Buddy Brooks carrying 55kg at $2.43. The run before that raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 11 at Turfway Park on February 25 over 1609m, 8 len behind Cleopatra's Nile with 54.5kg at $5.88. Doesn't pose too much of a threat.

form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 40-day let-up. First-up after seven months 4th of 7 at Turfway Park on March 7 over 1207m, 2.5 len behind Frango Electrico with 54.5kg at $6.79. Previously second-up 5th of 7 at Belterra Park on August 30 over 1308m, 17 len behind Pistol carrying 55.5kg at $11.90. Fitter again and a winning hope.

form.formComment: Last start ran last of 8 at Tampa Bay Downs on March 25 over 1408m, 26 len behind Jokes Up with 53.5kg at $9.10. The run before that 3rd in a small field at Gulfstream Park on February 20 over 1408m, 6 len behind Just A Philly carrying 56kg at $4. Poor run last time but she is better than that.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Comes here off a 35-day let-up. Most recently 2nd of 7 at Turfway Park on March 12 over 1308m, 4 len behind Caltha with 55kg at $3.07. The race before that won by 0.5 len at Turfway Park February 12 over 1308m defeating Councilwoman Jilly with 55kg at $8.74. Likely to play a big role.

form.formComment: Returns from a 29-day let-up. Last start settled back and ran on when 6th of 8 at Turfway Park on March 18 over 1710m, 11 len behind Jack's Summer carrying 54.5kg at $22.38. The start before that 9th of 11 at Turfway Park on March 5 over 1609m, 11 len behind Vino Rosato carrying 52kg at $28.69. Hard to make a case on recent form.
